creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please update Flash to
linux-c6-flashplugin-11.2r202.451?

I've reproduced the bug of not seeing Flash in about:plugins after upgrading Firefox to version 36.0.1,1, and it was fixed on my machine by 

1. reinstall flashplugin11 (or, in your case, updating it)
2. nspluginwrapper -a -v -i
3. quit all currently running firefox instances.
